Parameter: Cost per patient treated (all-in: drugs + diagnostics + monitoring)
Source / notes: Mid-range of $996-$2,573 across 4 LMICs (Pakistan, Philippines, SA, Ukraine)

Parameter: Mortality during treatment (1 - success - other failures)
Source / notes: Assumption: ~6% die during treatment (remainder relapse/lost to follow-up)
Conservative estimate; Tiemersma 2011 found 70% 10-year TB mortality

Parameter: Marginal lives saved per patient treated

Source / notes: Multiple Phase 3 RCTs — high IV, minor discount for open-label designs
Trial sites (SA, Uzbekistan, India) may differ from scaled programs

Parameter: Adjusted lives saved per patient treated

Source / notes: GBD 2021 MDR-TB demographics: mean age ~39, 62.6% under 40

Parameter: Moral weight per MDR-TB death averted (UoV)
Source / notes: Working-age adults dying at ~39; remaining LE ~30-35 years in LMIC

Parameter: Ad-hoc: morbidity averted (reduced treatment duration, fewer side effects)
Ad-hoc: transmission prevention (cured patients don't spread MDR-TB)
Source / notes: Assumption: 15% uplift for averted secondary cases

Parameter: Value per dollar spent on benchmark (GiveDirectly)

Source / notes: Scenario: low-end of country-level cost estimates (Pakistan)
Scenario: filling acute drug stockouts from US funding cuts
